description_long: This is a round, single-tier cake with a smooth, pastel pink exterior and a decorative white icing border along the top and bottom edges. The cake sits on a terracotta-colored round plate. On the front side, there is a printed design featuring the letters 'GB', the number '10', and a subtle rainbow stripe, along with a delicate line art motif. Atop the cake, large, upright letters 'GB' in a gradient of purple and pink serve as a bold decorative topper. The surface finish is matte and the overall style is minimalist with a modern celebratory theme. The cake appears to be made of typical cake sponge with a layer of buttercream or fondant icing.
description: A round, pastel pink cake with white icing trim, a 'GB' topper, and minimalist printed decorations, displayed on a terracotta plate.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'GB' topper, printed 'GB 10' design, and full decorative motif.
description_view_1: Side view with the 'GB' topper seen edge-on and only a partial glimpse of the printed motif.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the 'GB' topper and plain pink icing with no visible printed design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the 'GB' topper edge-on and a partial motif visible, but no text.
